body_copy: Westfield Collective is Central Indiana’s premier food, beverage, and entertainment destination, located on four acres adjacent to Grand Park in Westfield, Indiana. Westfield Collective combines chef-driven dining, social entertainment, and a world-class beach volleyball destination powered by ibeach volleyball into a single, year-round experience. The venue features six restaurant concepts, including an ice cream shop, two full-service bars, a dedicated Bourbon & Tequila Bar, private event spaces, live entertainment programming, and two self-pour beer, wine, and cocktail walls. With indoor and outdoor seating, a 25-foot LED screen for major sporting events, winter golf simulator bays, and flexible spaces for work and play, Westfield Collective delivers an all-in-one destination for families, athletes, and the surrounding community.

No matter the size of your gathering, Westfield Collective offers the perfect setting for your event. From intimate celebrations to large-scale parties, we provide versatile spaces tailored to your needs.

iBeach is Indy’s premier beach volleyball destination, offering year-round, state-of-the-art indoor and outdoor courts, housing competitors across an array of ages, skill, and format of play. Based in Westfield, Indiana, iBeach offers state-of-the-art amenities for athletes in leagues, clinics, tournaments, and special events. link to iBeach page

body_copy: Welcome toWestfield Collective, a one-of-a-kind entertainment-driven dining destination located on 4 acres near Grand Park in Westfield, Indiana. Westfield Collective was created to be a year-round gathering place where families, athletes, and the surrounding community come together to eat, play, and connect.

Westfield Collective blends chef-driven dining, social entertainment, and beach volleyball into one dynamic experience. The venue features six restaurant concepts – including an ice cream shop – two full-service bars, and a dedicated Bourbon & Tequila Bar. Guests can explore two self-pour walls offering rotating beer and wine selections, all within flexible indoor and outdoor seating areas centered around a 25-foot LED screen built for major sporting events and community watch parties.

Additional amenities include private event spaces, meeting rooms, remote workspaces, yard games, live entertainment programming, and seasonal golf simulator bays – making Westfield Collective a place to gather any day of the week.

A defining feature of Westfield Collective is its ibeach volleyball complex, positioning the property as a premier volleyball destination in Central Indiana. The facility includes four indoor sand courts and six outdoor courts designed for year-round play.

Programming ranges from youth development and club training to recreational and competitive leagues, open play, professional coaching, and sanctioned tournaments. The complex features professional-grade sand and evening lighting – allowing athletes and spectators to compete, train, and socialize all in one place.

Westfield Collective builds on the success of its sister property, Liberty Collective, located in Liberty Township, Ohio. As part of the Collective concept, created by Mike & Heather Ewers, the focus remains on creating community-centered gathering spaces that feel active, welcoming, and comfortable.

Whether you’re joining us for dinner, a tournament weekend, a game watch, or a night out with friends, Westfield Collective was designed to bring people together through shared experiences – before the game, after the game, and everything in between.
We look forward to welcoming you.

If you have the skills, passion, and vision to be part of our dynamic community, we want to hear from you!
Let’s collaborate to make Westfield Collective the ultimate destination for entertainment, dining, and culture!

body_copy: Join us Monday–Friday from 3–6 PM at Westfield Collective for the perfect mid-day reset.
Great drinks. Great food. Great vibes.
Whether you’re wrapping up work or getting a head start on the evening, this is your spot. See you at the bar. 🍹
Grand Opening vibes just got even better!
Join us at Westfield Collective as we officially cut the ribbon and celebrate our opening!
Swag bags for the first 50 guests.
Music all day with DJ Gray C spinning the perfect soundtrack.
Come for the food, stay for the fun, and celebrate with us—your new favorite spot is officially open!

body_copy: Experience the art of fine bourbon and tequila at The Bourbon & Tequila Bar, nestled within Westfield Collective. Whether you’re a seasoned enthusiast or simply exploring the world of premium spirits, our curated selection of top-shelf bourbons and rare tequilas offers something for every palate.

Beyond our exceptional pours, we host exclusive tasting events featuring limited releases, small-batch discoveries, and emerging labels — giving you the opportunity to explore new favorites and stay ahead of the latest trends in the world of spirits.

Savor hand-selected pours, expertly crafted flights, and distinctive barrel picks in an inviting, sophisticated atmosphere. Perfect for intimate tastings, celebratory toasts, and unforgettable evenings, The Bourbon & Tequila Bar is where bold flavor meets relaxed elegance.
Join us at Westfield Collective and raise your glass to exceptional taste.

body_copy: Fork & Fire was created from a simple idea: healthy food should be exciting, customizable, and full of flavor. Envisioned by founder Robert Vlox, Fork & Fire brings fresh, clean ingredients together in bold stir-fry bowls and vibrant salads—made exactly the way you want them. With a ‘Build Your Own’ approach and a modern menu rooted in freshness, Fork & Fire is about more than just great food—it’s about creating a welcoming space where friends, families, and communities can gather, connect, and build memories around a meal.

body_copy: Zaria Pizzeria serves handcrafted pizza, salads, and crave-worthy appetizers inside Westfield’s newest food hall. Named after founder Robert Viox’s granddaughter, Zaria was created to celebrate the spirit of family, connection, and good food made accessible. With a focus on quality ingredients and value-driven dining, Zaria offers both Pinsa-style artisan crust and classic New York-style pizza, bringing something unique to every guest. As Viox puts it, “Every neighborhood deserves a place for great pizza at a fair price”—and Zaria delivers just that.

body_copy: Stay on Top of Your Golf Game This Winter

When the temperatures drop, Westfield Collective’s state-of-the-art indoor golf simulators keep your swing sharp, your skills honed, and the game going strong—no matter the weather through the months of November through March.
Experience ultra-realistic courses, precision ball tracking, and detailed swing analysis.
Stay warm while perfecting your game in our climate-controlled space.
Tee off at legendary courses from around the world, all from the comfort of our facility.

headings.text: Host Your Next Event at Westfield Collective

body_copy: No matter the size of your gathering, Westfield Collective offers the perfect setting for your event. From intimate celebrations to large-scale parties, we provide versatile spaces tailored to your needs.
For more information or to book your event, submit an inquiry below.
Private Event Room: An exclusive indoor room for a more personalized experience.
Top Mezzanine: A spacious area that can be divided to suit smaller or larger groups.
The Fireplace:A cozy space with a variety of seating at the top of the steps.
Second-Floor Wrap Around Outdoor Deck:Enjoy scenic views and an open-air atmosphere, with year-round versatility.
First-Floor Outdoor Patios: Wrap-around patio perfect for relaxed gatherings and casual dining.
Volleyball Courts: Host a friendly competition or team-building activity on our six outdoor, and 4 indoor beach courts.
Let Westfield Collective make your event memorable with our unique venues and exceptional service. Change out photos on the page to one with the patio, one with the deck, one with the fireplace.

body_copy: Founded in 2018, iBeach is Indy’s premier beach volleyball destination, offering year-round, state-of- the-art indoor and outdoor courts, housing competitors across an array of ages, skill, and format of play. Based in Westfield, Indiana, iBeach offers state-of-the-art amenities for athletes in leagues, clinics, tournaments, and special events. For more information, visitwww.ibeachvolleyball.comor follow@ibeachvolleyballon Instagram and Facebook.

body_copy: Bristol’s Burgers Beef and BBQ: A Story of Comfort and Quality :

Experience amazing double decker cheeseburgers, award winning wings, smoked BBQ or try our Spicy Italian Beef. The smoked wings have been perfected over the years and perfect sides always include white cheddar mac & cheese and amazing brussel sprouts.

Owner Robert Viox opened his first family-run restaurant and food truck in 2017 with the mission to serve the best hickory smoked BBQ in the region. And no doubt he’s reached that goal having been named the Best BBQ in Northern Kentucky three times at Four Mile Pig.  Robert’s latest restaurant, Bristol’s is named after Robert’s middle granddaughter. “Bristol is a comfortable and calming presence in our family who lights up the room,” he says with a smile. “Naming the restaurant after her is my way of creating a legacy—a place where she can always feel at home.” and now it is yours to enjoy at Westfield Collective.

body_copy: Pour What You Want, When You Want – No Waiting!

Welcome to Collective Pour, where you’re in control of your perfect drink. Our self-pour experience features 30 rotating taps of craft and domestic beers, artisan cocktails, and fine wines – available on two self-pour walls, one on the main level and one on the second floor – all right at your fingertips.
Craft & unique beers from local and global brewers
Handcrafted cocktails, expertly mixed and ready to pour
Try a little or pour more – it’s all up to you. Cheers to great drinks and zero waiting.

body_copy: Located on the first floor at Westfield Collective, The Main Bar is the perfect place to unwind, refuel, and celebrate—whether you’re fresh off The Beach or just need a beverage.
24 Taps pouring ice-cold craft and domestic beers
A curated selection of wine & premium spirits

The Main Bar delivers a laid-back, lively atmosphere where you can enjoy your drinks outside on the patio, in one of the many Adirondack chairs in the grass, on the deck or inside Westfield Collective.

body_copy: The Mezzanine Bar – Elevated Views, Exceptional Drinks

Perched on the second floor of Westfield Collective, the Mezzanine Bar offers the perfect blend of indoor comfort and outdoor vibes. Step out onto our spacious deck for a birds eye view of the volleyball courts, or stay inside and catch all the action on our massive 25-foot screen or one of the many TVs.
24 Taps pouring ice-cold craft and domestic beers
A curated selection of wine & premium spirits
Whether you’re here for the game, the view, or the drinks, the Mezzanine Bar is the perfect spot to elevate your night.

body_copy: A chicken tender is not always just a chicken tender!

At Ms. Lei Lei’s, we keep it fresh and simple by letting the ingredients speak for themselves. Each chicken tender is house-brined and hand-breaded. Our original chicken sandwich is a favorite topped with red cabbage slaw and you won’t want to miss adding our hand-cut jumbo onion rings.

Fresh salads are an important part of the menu as well, letting our tenders take 2nd fiddle to fresh ingredients and flavorful house made dressings. Chef Jarrod Ante welcomes you to taste the difference!

body_copy: A space where great friendships are built over great food. Freshness and quality ingredients are at the forefront of Roberto and Miguel’s. Chef’s, (and friends) Miguel and Esteban lean into their Guatemalan roots to infuse every aspect of the menu, from the flavors of their dishes to the warmth of their hospitality.

On the menu at Roberto & Miguel’s, you can expect to find a variety of authentic dishes, each bursting with flavor and made with love. From our tacos to our signature burritos, and birria. Be sure to add fresh guacamole and queso with chips and share with friends and family.

body_copy: We’re a modern sweet shop built on nostalgia, creativity, and indulgence.From fresh-made crepes and handdipped sundaes to stacked cookie sandwiches and savory paninis, our menu is designed to bring comfort and excitement together in every bite. We focus on quality ingredients, and bold combinations through fresh crepes, pressed paninis, specialty coffee, and indulgent desserts under one roof. A destination where savory meets sweet — and every plate feels thoughtfully prepared and genuinely craveable.

body_copy: Thursday League: September 4 – October 16, games at 6:00 P.M.
Sunday League: September 7 – October 19, games at 6:00 P.M.
Matches begin at 6:00 P.M. each week and continue until all scheduled games are complete.
At least2 female players must be on the court at all times.
Each team must designate acaptainto register the team and receive weekly updates.
Each match consists of3 games to 21 points.
A team must win by2 pointsto take a set.
Team Fee: $360 (due prior to the team’s first match).
Payment must be completed before participation.
All players are required to sign a liability waiver before their first match.
